name: DealRail Operator Agent
goal: Turn a buyer request into a provider shortlist, an execution posture, and a verifiable receipt trail.
capabilities: shared backend with the browser desk
guardrails: The public backend does not accept raw private keys for settlement routes.
Public settlement writes only support managed demo actors on the hosted backend.
Curated discovery in mock mode is described as curated demo supply, not a fully live market.
Uniswap is exposed as a Base-only routing preview, not as recorded swap execution.
